testcase.name: test_admin_send_email_updates_log_status

failure.message: AssertionError: Log status is 'queued', expected 'sent' or 'failed' (NOT 'queued' — this is the exact bug being fixed) assert 'queued' in ('sent', 'failed')

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_email_queue_status.py:99: in test_admin_send_email_updates_log_status assert final_status in ("sent", "failed"), ( E AssertionError: Log status is 'queued', expected 'sent' or 'failed' (NOT 'queued' — this is the exact bug being fixed) E assert 'queued' in ('sent', 'failed')
